'''yazhovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pocking|pocking]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pocking|pocking]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yazhovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzheveth|yæzheveth]] || [[word:yæzhevej|yæzhevej]] || [[word:yæzhevesh|yæzhevesh]] || [[word:yæzheve|yæzheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazhozhovoth|yazhozhovoth]] || [[word:yazhozhovoj|yazhozhovoj]] || [[word:yazhozhovosh|yazhozhovosh]] || [[word:yazhozhovo|yazhozhovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazhovoth|yazhovoth]] || [[word:yazhovoj|yazhovoj]] || [[word:yazhovosh|yazhovosh]] || [[word:yazhovo|yazhovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazhofvoth|yazhofvoth]] || [[word:yazhofvoj|yazhofvoj]] || [[word:yazhofvosh|yazhofvosh]] || [[word:yazhofvof|yazhofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazhovotho|yazhovotho]] || [[word:yazhovojo|yazhovojo]] || [[word:yazhovosho|yazhovosho]] || [[word:yazhovoko|yazhovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazhovoth|yazhovoth]] || [[word:yazhovoj|yazhovoj]] || [[word:yazhovosh|yazhovosh]] || [[word:yazhovo|yazhovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazhovothol|yazhovothol]] || [[word:yazhovojol|yazhovojol]] || [[word:yazhovoshol|yazhovoshol]] || [[word:yazhovokol|yazhovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazhovothotho|yazhovothotho]] || [[word:yazhovojojo|yazhovojojo]] || [[word:yazhovoshosho|yazhovoshosho]] || [[word:yazhovoko|yazhovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazhovothon|yazhovothon]] || [[word:yazhovojon|yazhovojon]] || [[word:yazhovoshon|yazhovoshon]] || [[word:yazhovokon|yazhovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazhovothoro|yazhovothoro]] || [[word:yazhovojoro|yazhovojoro]] || [[word:yazhovoshoro|yazhovoshoro]] || [[word:yazhovokoro|yazhovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
